content: count is the canonical metric for quantities or counts of rows/models depending on scope and intent. Use for 'how many' and count breakdowns.

total_spend is the aggregate metric for money spent on owned knives. It is computed from purchase_price multiplied by quantity. Use for 'how much did I spend', 'money spent', or 'spend by year/family/series'.
msrp is used for completion-cost or retail-based calculations. Use when the user asks what it would cost to complete the collection or explicitly asks about MSRP.
